flip_axes.description: draw the chart horizontally when true

prop.description: the result column for the X/category axis

y.description: one or more Y/value series to plot (at least one)

prop.description: the result column for this Y/value series

axes_label.description: the legend + axis label for this series

display_as.description: how to draw this series (default bar)

shape.description: line shape (default discrete; ignored for bars)

color_hue.description: hue 0-360; omit for a stable auto hue derived from axes_label

stack_group.description: series sharing a stack_group are stacked; others sit side by side
